text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while walking with Mejiro Dober in the
shopping district...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clang-clang! Clang-clang!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Step right up and try your luck with our New
Year's raffle! This year's grand prize is a hot
spring vacation for two!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
First-prize winners get a deluxe carrot hamburger
steak! Second-prize winners get a bushel of
carrots! And third-prize winners can take home a
single carrot!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Don't let this opportunity pass you by! Get a
ticket now and spin for your chance to win!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huh, they're holding a raffle.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Why don't we give it a try, Trainer?
choice_data_list: Someone's eager.
Someone's eager.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
So what if I am? I didn't draw a fortune on New
Year's, after all.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I suppose I am. I didn't draw a fortune on New
Year's, after all.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I thought this would be a good chance to test our
luck. So? What do you think?
choice_data_list: All right, let's give it a shot!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I thought this would be a good chance to test our
luck. So? What do you think?
choice_data_list: All right, let's give it a shot!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Okay.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Thanks. Let's get a ticket, then. Let's see... Looks
like we'll have to make a purchase in order to get
a raffle ticket.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober and I go off to buy some things in
order to get a ticket. Once we do, we return to
the location of the raffle, and...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober and I give the raffle machine a
powerful spin together!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A small plastic ball drops from the tumbler's
opening...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Holy mackerel! We've got ourselves a grand-prize
winner! Come and get the coupon for your hot
spring vacation! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: W-we got the grand prize?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Incredible... I can't believe our luck turned out this good!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Why, that's the same as drawing a super-duper great fortune at the temple!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, you're right! This is so much better than a
regular great fort—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Wait, Fukukitaru?!
choice_data_list: Oh, aren't you one of Dober's friends?
Oh, aren't you one of Dober's friends?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Indeed! The name's Matikanefukukitaru! Happy
New Year!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I was just in that nearby bookstore when I heard
mention of the word "luck" and realized I was
being summoned by the universe!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But to think you won the grand prize! What
super-duper great luck indeed! This is an
indication that your future together will be a very
bright one!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Um... Thank you? I think?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
While we're at it, would you like me to read your
fortune, Dober? I can determine when you should
go to the hot spring—and with whom!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huh?!
choice_data_list:
Why not? Sounds like a good opportunity to
me.

Why not? Sounds like a good opportunity to
me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: What? W-wait!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I've got it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Already?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You must go when both of your affairs have
calmed down. And the ideal person to go with is
someone who is always by your side!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
And with that, I shall take my leave! I bid you
both adieu!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Hmph...
choice_data_list: You seem mad.
That's how fortunes are.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: What an extremely vague fortune...
choice_data_list: You seem mad.
That's how fortunes are.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
You didn't let me answer for myself and just let
her do whatever she wanted.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
That's true. Anyway, if either of us wants to go
with someone else, we can just give them this
voucher.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, I'll hold on to the voucher until things
calm down.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
But if we end up deciding to go together, well...
We can cross that bridge when we get to it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, Mejiro Dober takes the voucher for
safekeeping.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, Mejiro Dober takes the voucher for
safekeeping.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we have another first-prize winner!
Congratulations! You get one deluxe carrot
hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: We won the first prize? No way...
choice_data_list:
Wow, that's like drawing a great fortune on
New Year's!

Wow, that's like drawing a great fortune on
New Year's!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, what are you so excited about? I mean, I
know I was the one who mentioned it...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. You're right. Maybe this is a sign of good
things to come!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Haha! You two sure are close. Here, have a bonus
gift as a treat!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Haha! You two sure are close. Here, have a bonus
gift as a treat!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Wha?! W-we're not close at all!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huh? A bonus gift? We couldn't possibly accept...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Here you go—two pieces of candy. That's all
you're getting, since I can't be handing out extra
steaks willy-nilly. Be good and share those, now!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Here you go—two pieces of candy. That's all
you're getting, since I can't be handing out extra
steaks willy-nilly. Be good and share those, now!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: O-oh! Uh, thank you very much!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Um, anyway... about the prize we just won—
choice_data_list: Which flavor do you want?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Oh, you mean the candy? If it's between
orange and strawberry, I guess I prefer the
strawberry.
choice_data_list:
Okay. I'll make sure to give it to you along with
this hamburger steak when we part ways.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Oh, okay. Thanks.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(Right, yeah... Trainer wouldn't ask me to eat it
together. What was I thinking?)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(Am I out of my mind? This isn't some cheesy
manga—it's real life!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't know why, but Mejiro Dober starts
smacking her head as if reprimanding herself as
we leave the shopping district.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
We got a second-prize winner! It's your lucky day!
You're going home with a bushel of carrots!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Wow! Hehe. I guess this would equate to drawing
a good fortune, huh?
choice_data_list: Not bad!
Not bad!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Yeah... It's not bad.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I hope this is a sign of even better things to
come.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I'm glad we did this together.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I'm glad we did this together.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Especially since we'll be walking the same path
together for so much long—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Wait. Forget you heard anything. I feel like I just
said something really embarrassing...
choice_data_list: I didn't think it was?
I didn't think it was?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Well, it was, so forget it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I guess it's fine if it doesn't bother you...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As we walk home in the light of the setting sun,
Mejiro Dober's cheeks seem just a bit redder than
normal.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As we walk home in the light of the setting sun,
Mejiro Dober's cheeks seem just a bit redder than
normal.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Would you lookie here! You've won the third
prize! Here's your carrot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I suppose this is the same as a modest fortune.
Hehe.
choice_data_list: You look pretty pleased about it.
You look pretty pleased about it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: And what's wrong with that?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I just feel like it's a fitting prize for me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Winning this means there are still greater and
higher heights I can aim for.
choice_data_list: That's a good point.
That's a good point.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Winning this means there are still greater and
higher heights I can aim for.
choice_data_list: That's a good point.
That's a good point.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Right. That's why I have to keep up this
momentum.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Right. That's why I have to keep up this
momentum.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: After all, this is just the start...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober smiles as she looks at the lone
carrot she won.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, tough luck! Looks like you pulled a blank
one! Take this pack of tissues as a consolation
prize.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Oh... We didn't win anything...
choice_data_list: Do you want to try again?
It's okay! How about we try again?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry...
choice_data_list: Do you want to try again?
It's okay! How about we try again?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
No, forget it. You're only supposed to draw your
fortune once, anyway.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
No, forget it. You're only supposed to draw your
fortune once, anyway.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'd already decided to work hard no matter what
the results were, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Sorry. I shouldn't have even suggested doing this
raffle.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Sigh. Sorry for making things weird and forcing you to walk on eggshells...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As we head home, I try reassuring Mejiro Dober
that she has nothing to feel bad about, but she
remains despondent.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As we head home, I try reassuring Mejiro Dober
that she has nothing to feel bad about, but she
remains despondent.
